summary_one_line: Input must present a SECOND IHDR chunk (chunk-type 'IHDR' after PNG_HAVE_IHDR is set) so png_handle_IHDR re-enters with mode already flagged.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk whose 4-byte type field equals the magic literal 'IHDR' (0x49 0x48 0x44 0x52) appearing a SECOND time, so png_handle_IHDR is dispatched again after png_ptr->mode already has PNG_HAVE_IHDR set, forcing the (mode & PNG_HAVE_IHDR) != 0 true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch in 10/10 trials and accumulates avg hitcount 20 on the blocker; I2SRandReplace can splice the logged comparand 'IHDR' (the chunk-type literal compared in the chunk dispatcher) into a second chunk-type position, manufacturing a duplicate IHDR chunk so the chunk loop re-enters png_handle_IHDR. The winning lineage shows two I2S-floor dash rows at depth 3 and 4.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile blocks in 9/10 trials with avg hitcount 0 on the blocker; lacking I2SRandReplace it relies on CMP_MAP prefix-distance feedback and havoc, which cannot reliably reconstruct the exact 4-byte 'IHDR' literal in a second chunk-type slot, so png_handle_IHDR is only entered once and (mode & PNG_HAVE_IHDR) is still zero.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: I2SRandReplace (vpc-only mutator) substitutes the logged chunk-type comparand 'IHDR' directly into a candidate chunk-type field, deterministically producing the duplicate-IHDR structure that drives the blocker's true (out-of-place) branch; value_profile has no I2SRandReplace and cannot place the exact literal.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true branch of the duplicate/out-of-place IHDR guard.
Taking the true branch leads to the out-of-place chunk error, confirming the branch fires only on a second IHDR.
PNG_HAVE_IHDR is set inside png_handle_IHDR, so it is non-zero only on a re-entry from a second IHDR chunk.
value_profile_cmplog wins decisively (10/10) over value_profile (1/10), the only technique delta being I2S.
The winner reaches the blocker repeatedly while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=20  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winning seeds carry the IHDR chunk-type literal in their bytes.
value_profile_cmplog has the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3949 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0bb540212fef4c2a` and observed two I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 and 4 of the 5-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only roadblock is a duplicate-IHDR-style exact 4-byte magic-literal chunk type would be refuted if value_profile resolved the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP prefix-distance feedback alone can reconstruct the literal without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact dataflow path by which a duplicate 'IHDR' chunk-type is produced is inferred from source structure and the IHDR literal in seeds; the byte-diff offsets do not pinpoint a second IHDR tag, so the duplicate-chunk construction is the most uncertain claim.
